stemHtml: What is the main role of the World Meteorological Organisation (WMO), with regard to aviation?

options.a: Provide detailed information about the most serious meteorological hazards for aviation, globally, including volcanic ash clouds and tropical cyclones.
options.b: Establish and implement, together with ICAO, a global regulatory framework for aviation meteorological services.
options.c: Maintain watch over meteorological conditions affecting flight operations within specific areas of responsibility
options.d: Provide global forecasts of upper winds and temperature for flights throughout the world.
